channel.title: Serial on Tinkering
channel.description: Recent content in Serial on Tinkering

item.title: Bringing async to serial devices
item.description: I’m an experimental physicist, so part of my job entails writing software that orchestrates equipment in my experiment. Most of the code that runs my experiment is written in a proprietary scripting language that I guarantee none of you have ever heard of. The old code is brittle, difficult to debug, and generally makes it too much of a pain to add features unless absolutely necessary. Lately I’ve been thinking about how I would do a modernized rewrite in Python.
